creator: andreas.sommer87@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #41)
The question is whether an upgrade from 2.1.x to 2.2/2.3 would be eligible for MFH. It's probably not a trivial blanket build fix, since the minor version changes. So do the Python port experts here think a merge-back would be fine after this lands in head?
